title: The Case of the Lost Airship

scenes.text: An airship vanished without a trace, leaving a baffling mystery.
It happened in Goodyear, Arizona, during a routine flight.
In 1937, the Goodyear airship mysteriously disappeared on a test flight.
The fate of the airship remains one of aviation's greatest mysteries.
Despite extensive searches, no wreckage was ever recovered.
scenes.label: NO WRECKAGE FOUND
scenes.sub: A mystery unfolds in the skies.

scenes.text: Follow for a new cold case every day.

description: 📍 Goodyear, Arizona, USA - 1937. An airship vanished during a test flight and has never been found. Follow for daily cold cases!
